description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a matte black finish and a wooden stock and fore-end. The receiver is metallic and colored gold, contrasting with the darker barrel and wood components. The stock is full-sized, made from polished wood, and ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The lever loop is visible beneath the receiver, indicating the action mechanism. The trigger guard is integrated with the lever, forming a continuous, rounded metallic loop. The overall design is reminiscent of late 19th-century firearms, with a robust and utilitarian appearance suitable for both display and functional use.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long black barrel, gold receiver, and polished wooden stock, featuring a classic, robust design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the gold receiver, wooden stock, and black barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the lever and trigger guard, with the wooden stock and barrel clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded, elongated trigger guard integrated with the lever, forming a continuous metallic loop
